◎简　　介  

　　Carolyn may be a die-hard romantic, but that doesn't stop her from getting a case of cold feet the eve of her engagement to Mr. Maybe-Not-So-Right. What better way to restore her faith in true love than with a visit from three "spirits" of boyfriends, past, present and future. This Valentine's-themed "Christmas Carol" is sure to melt your heart.
